data.title: Allied Gaming Reshapes Board Committees After Director Resignations
data.description:

An update from Allied Gaming & Entertainment ( (AGAE) ) is now available.

On March 30, 2026, Allied Gaming & Entertainment announced that directors Yushi Guo and Jerry Qin resigned from the Board and all committees on which they served, effective immediately. Following their departures, the company reconstituted its governance structure, naming Mao Sun, Jingsheng Lu and Yuanfei Qu to the Audit Committee, assigning Yuanfei Qu, Chi Zhao and Mao Sun to the Compensation Committee, and appointing Chi Zhao, Jingsheng Lu and Mao Sun to the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee.

The most recent analyst rating on (AGAE) stock is a Hold with a $0.27 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Allied Gaming & Entertainment stock, see the AGAE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AGAE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AGAE is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by very weak fundamentals—deep losses, near-zero margins, and heavy ongoing cash burn—alongside a pronounced downtrend in the stock. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings, and corporate events add risk due to the Nasdaq delisting warning despite some supportive governance developments.

To see Spark’s full report on AGAE stock, click here.

More about Allied Gaming & Entertainment

Allied Gaming & Entertainment operates in the gaming and entertainment industry, focusing on esports, live events and related digital content. The company’s governance structure includes a Board of Directors and key committees overseeing audit, compensation and nominating and corporate governance functions to support its strategic and operational direction.

data.description:

Newtek Business ( (NEWT) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 1, 2026, NewtekOne, Inc. renewed for an additional year the employment agreements of Chief Executive Officer and President Barry Sloane, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary Michael A. Schwartz, and Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President Frank DeMaria. Newtek Bank, N.A., the company’s subsidiary, also renewed for one year the employment agreement of its president, Peter Downs.

The terms of Sloane’s agreement remain unchanged from the prior arrangement, while the renewed agreements for Downs, Schwartz, and DeMaria now include a non-renewal payment equal to one year of base compensation. The move underscores NewtekOne’s emphasis on continuity in its leadership team and provides greater clarity around executive retention and exit economics for key stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (NEWT) stock is a Hold with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Newtek Business stock, see the NEWT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NEWT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NEWT is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by balance-sheet leverage and weak/volatile operating cash flow, despite strong profitability. Cheap valuation (low P/E and high yield) and a generally constructive earnings outlook support the score, while bearish technicals and continued credit/legacy portfolio risks limit upside near term.

To see Spark’s full report on NEWT stock, click here.

More about Newtek Business

NewtekOne, Inc. operates as a financial services provider through its subsidiary Newtek Bank, N.A., with a management structure led by a chief executive, chief financial officer, chief legal officer, and bank president. The company’s governance framework relies on formal employment and change-in-control agreements to structure executive compensation and retention.

data.title: Denali Regains DNL593 Rights After Takeda Collaboration Ends
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Denali Therapeutics ( (DNLI) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 3, 2026, Denali Therapeutics said Takeda Pharmaceutical will terminate their 2018 collaboration to co-develop and co-commercialize DNL593, an investigational progranulin replacement therapy for GRN-related frontotemporal dementia. The decision, described as strategic and not data-driven, will take effect 60 days after notice, at which point Denali regains full global rights and intellectual property and has no further financial obligations to Takeda.

Denali, which has led development of DNL593, plans to continue the program independently and report results from its ongoing Phase 1/2 study in FTD-GRN by the end of 2026. The trial has fully enrolled 40 patients, and earlier interim data from healthy volunteers showed dose-dependent increases in cerebrospinal fluid progranulin and no significant safety signals, reinforcing Denali’s positioning around its clinically validated TransportVehicle blood-brain barrier-crossing technology in a field with no approved disease-modifying FTD treatments.

The most recent analyst rating on (DNLI) stock is a Hold with a $19.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Denali Therapeutics stock, see the DNLI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DNLI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DNLI is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (widening losses, cash burn, and recent $0 revenue) and bearish technical signals. These are partly offset by strong, positive corporate catalysts (FDA accelerated approval and $200M non-dilutive funding) and a low-leverage balance sheet.

To see Spark’s full report on DNLI stock, click here.

More about Denali Therapeutics

Denali Therapeutics Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing biotherapeutics that cross the blood-brain barrier using its proprietary TransportVehicle platform. The company is building a portfolio of candidates targeting neurodegenerative diseases, lysosomal storage disorders and other serious conditions with high unmet medical need.

Average Trading Volume: 1,810,469

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.27B

Learn more about DNLI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

The latest announcement is out from AMC Networks ( (AMCX) ).

AMC Networks Inc., a U.S. entertainment and television content provider, reported a leadership change in its finance organization effective March 31, 2026. The company, which operates cable networks and streaming services with a focus on premium and niche programming, continues to emphasize stability in its financial oversight structure.

On March 31, 2026, the previously announced resignation of Chief Financial Officer Patrick O’Connell took effect, with the company stating his departure was not due to any disagreement over operations, policies or practices. In connection with his exit, Chief Accounting Officer Michael J. Sherin III assumed the role of principal financial officer on an interim basis, signaling a transitional phase in the company’s senior financial leadership while maintaining continuity in fiscal management.

The most recent analyst rating on (AMCX) stock is a Hold with a $6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AMC Networks stock, see the AMCX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AMCX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AMCX is a Neutral.

AMCX scores mid-range primarily due to resilient cash generation and a profitability rebound, partially offset by ongoing multi-year revenue decline and leverage risk. Technicals are notably weak and weigh on the score, while earnings-call guidance points to near-term profitability and cash flow pressure despite continued progress on streaming mix shift and debt reduction.

To see Spark’s full report on AMCX stock, click here.

More about AMC Networks

AMC Networks Inc. is a U.S.-based entertainment company operating in the media and television industry, known for producing and distributing premium content across cable networks, streaming platforms and other channels. The company focuses on niche and genre-driven programming, targeting engaged audiences through its portfolio of branded networks and services.

The latest announcement is out from Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A ( (BHM) ).

On April 1, 2026, Bluerock Homes Trust issued 108,699 long-term incentive plan units in its operating partnership and 84,055 shares of Class A common stock as restricted stock grants to members of the executive management team of its external manager and certain other personnel, as compensation for services rendered during the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The awards, made in a private offering under securities law exemptions, will vest ratably over three years from April 1, 2026, providing recipients with ongoing distributions and potential future conversion of LTIP units into operating partnership units and, ultimately, Class A common stock, further aligning management incentives with shareholder interests.

The most recent analyst rating on (BHM) stock is a Buy with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A stock, see the BHM Stock Forecast page.

More about Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. is a Maryland corporation that operates through its operating partnership, Bluerock Residential Holdings, L.P., and utilizes an external manager, Bluerock Homes Manager, LLC, to oversee executive management and personnel who provide services to the Manager, compensating them in part through long-term equity incentive structures tied to the company’s Class A common stock and partnership units.

data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd. ( (IN:ANANDRATHI) ).

Anand Rathi Wealth Limited has submitted a compliance certificate to the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE for the quarter ended 31 March 2026, in line with Regulation 74(5) of SEBI’s Depositories and Participants Regulations, 2018. The certificate, issued by its registrar and share transfer agent MUFG Intime India, confirms that securities received for dematerialisation during the quarter were processed, verified, mutilated and cancelled as required, with depositories correctly recorded as registered owners within prescribed timelines.

This routine filing underscores the company’s adherence to regulatory norms governing dematerialisation and listing of securities on stock exchanges. The confirmation supports transparency and operational integrity in its share transfer and custody processes, providing reassurance to regulators, investors and other stakeholders about proper handling of its equity securities.

More about Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd.

Anand Rathi Wealth Limited is a Mumbai-based wealth management company focused on private wealth services. The firm operates as an AMFI-registered mutual fund distributor, offering advisory and distribution solutions to high-net-worth and other individual investors in India’s financial markets.

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd. ( (IN:SHRIPISTON) ) has provided an update.

SPR Auto Technologies Limited has renewed and revised its long-standing technical collaboration with Japan’s Fuji OOZX Inc., extending the arrangement for another five years. The agreement continues to focus on supplying technical know-how and assistance for manufacturing engine valves in India, ensuring the company can address evolving customer requirements.

Under the amended terms, SPR Auto will keep paying royalty to Fuji for the licensed technology while all other conditions of the collaboration remain unchanged. The company expects the continued access to advanced global manufacturing technology to strengthen its ability to serve the automotive market and pursue new business opportunities, reinforcing its positioning as a supplier of cutting-edge engine valve solutions.

More about Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd.

SPR Auto Technologies Limited, formerly Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited, operates in the automotive components sector, manufacturing products in India for both domestic and export markets. The company focuses on advanced engine components, including engine valves, serving the automotive industry with technology aligned to global standards.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

Intel ( (INTC) ) has provided an update.

On March 30, 2026, Intel announced that Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer April Miller Boise will depart the company, with her separation effective June 1, 2026. Upon leaving, she will receive severance benefits under Intel’s Executive Severance Plan in exchange for a release of claims, signaling a planned leadership transition in the company’s top legal role.

The move marks a notable change in Intel’s senior management ranks, potentially affecting continuity in its legal and compliance strategy during a period of industry and regulatory complexity. Stakeholders may watch closely how Intel fills the chief legal position and manages this transition to maintain stability in governance and risk oversight.

The most recent analyst rating on (INTC) stock is a Hold with a $45.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Intel stock, see the INTC Stock Forecast page.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance—especially compressed profitability and persistently negative free cash flow—despite a workable balance sheet. Technicals are neutral and do not provide a strong trend signal. Valuation support is limited due to a negative P/E and missing dividend yield. The earnings call adds modest support from operational progress and improving quarterly cash generation, but near-term guidance weakness, supply constraints, and ongoing foundry losses temper the outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on INTC stock, click here.
